stemHtml: In terms of surface condition, what are the differences between a damp and a wet runway?

options.a: On a damp runway the surface appears reflective, on a wet runway more than 25% of the surface area is covered by surface water more than 3 mm deep.
options.b: On a damp runway the moisture on it does NOT give it a shiny appearance, on a wet runway the surface appears reflective.
options.c: On a damp runway there are only a few areas of standing water, on a wet runway the surface appears reflective.
options.d: On a damp runway the moisture on it gives it a shiny appearance, on a wet runway the surface appears reflective.
